summary: For a placeholder copy kernel on large ND tensors, using BLOCK_DIM=8, TILE_NUM=8, and double buffering made each UB tile too large and caused 507035 vector-core exceptions with 'ub address out of bounds'. The stable fix was to shrink the copy kernel to a single core, single buffer, and much smaller tiles (BLOCK_DIM=1, TILE_NUM=512) so GM->UB->GM copies stay within UB limits.
